articles.title: Solana’s stablecoin supply surges past $3 billion, USDC leads the charge
articles.description: Stablecoin supply on the layer-1 blockchain network Solana has increased steadily since the beginning of the year, crossing the $3 billion mark during the past week. Data from the blockchain analytical platform Artemis shows that the stablecoin supply on the network has increased by 55.72% in the last three months to reach $3.12 billion. Notably, […] The post Solana’s stablecoin supply surges past $3 billion, USDC leads the charge appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Shiba Inu’s March burn achieves 23.3x monthly rate increase
articles.description: The Shiba Inu community burnt over 15 billion SHIB tokens in March. This accomplishment was 23.3 times the jump in the monthly burn rate of the token. Shibburn data reveals that, in total, 15,644,329,668 SHIB tokens were burned through 217 transactions. This trend of activity reflects the community’s commitment to reducing the token’s supply and, […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu Fires Up With 4,000% Burn – Price Rebound Coming?
articles.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), the popular dog-themed meme coin, is experiencing conflicting signals amidst the recent crypto market slump. While the burn rate, a metric indicating the rate at which tokens are permanently removed from circulation, skyrocketed by over 4,000% in the past 24 hours, the token’s price continues to decline. articles.title: U.S. Government Moves $2 Billion in Bitcoin to Coinbase, Impacting Market
articles.description: The Bitcoin (BTC) price is eyeing a possible breakout to the south of the $65,000 level as the market readies itself for a potential $2.1 billion sale of confiscated Silk Road Bitcoin tokens by the US government.
